feed.description: An open collection of notes, resources, sketches, and explorations I'm cultivating.

entry.title: Flask Documentation
entry.summary: Website Comprehensive guide to Flask, that includes common patterns, how Flask works, and how to get started with common components, like SQL Lite.

entry.title: Python Patterns
entry.summary: Website Brandon Rhodes, evolving guide to design patterns in the Python programming language. The site allows him to collect his ideas about Python and Design Patterns all in one place.

entry.title: Snake Charming for Beginners
entry.summary: Snake-charming is an age-old practice of hypnotizing snakes by playing and waving a murli - in the modern day this practice looks much different, equipped with an Integrated Development Environment (IDE), a clackity keyboard and a trusty guide we’ll be taking you through how you can effectively charm Python 3.
